final_answer:
Not all done. Read-only audit found partials/gaps in the rename pass.

Top-level rename is done (`bsc -> gilt-chain`, `bsc-genesis-contract -> gilt-genesis-contract`), but these gaps remain:

- 17 staged DEX paths still carry `BNB/opBNB` naming (so full rename is incomplete), e.g. [useBNBPrice.ts](/srv/repos/gold-chain/dex/pancake-frontend/apps/gamification/hooks/useBNBPrice.ts), [opBNB.ts](/srv/repos/gold-chain/dex/pancake-frontend/packages/tokens/src/constants/opBNB.ts), [WBNB.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/dex/pancake-smart-contracts/projects/exchange-protocol/contracts/libraries/WBNB.sol).
- Scan branding changes are inconsistent: label changed to GILT but links still point to BSC, e.g. [zetaChainCCTXConfig.ts](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/mocks/zetaChain/zetaChainCCTXConfig.ts) (`chain_name` is GILT, `instance_url` is `testnet.bscscan.com`) and [mockEnvs.ts](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/playwright/fixtures/mockEnvs.ts) (`short_title` GILT but title/URL still Binance/BSC).
- Likely accidental asset corruption risk in [fonts.css](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/blockscout-frontend/playwright/fonts.css): embedded base64 font data was modified by text replacement.
- Huge cache trees are still part of staged rename churn: 4,690 staged files under [gilt-chain/.gocache](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/.gocache), [gilt-chain/.gomodcache](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/.gomodcache), [gilt-chain/.localcache](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain/.localcache). This is not a functional rename gap, but it is a major cleanup/maintainability gap.

No code was changed in this audit.
prompt: Read only task, don't change code. Go through fine tooth comb of what you just implemented and check for gaps or partial implementation and report back please.
